title: Mid-Level Radiologist at SRL Diagnostics Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at SRL Diagnostics Global Group
jsonLd.description:
SRL Diagnostics Global Group has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Ludhiana office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About SRL Diagnostics Global Group:
SRL Diagnostics Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics Global Group!
